items.title: From high-dimensional data to annotated scatter plot
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  raw["High-dim X or embeddings"] --> reduce["PCA / t-SNE / UMAP"]
  reduce --> coords["2D or 3D coordinates Z"]
  meta["Labels and metadata"] --> join["Join on sample index"]
  coords --> join
  join --> plot["Scatter with color, size, alpha"]
  plot --> read["Interpret clusters and errors"]
items.caption: Visualization sits after coordinate generation; metadata joins enable label-driven and error-driven views.

items.title: Visual channels for metadata encoding
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  meta["Metadata field"]
  meta --> cat["Categorical label"]
  meta --> cont["Continuous score"]
  meta --> err["Correct vs wrong prediction"]
  cat --> color["Discrete color + legend"]
  cont --> cmap["Sequential colormap + colorbar"]
  err --> dual["Color = truth, marker = error"]
items.caption: Match encoding channel to data type; dual encoding supports qualitative confusion analysis.

items.title: Reading a cluster without over-interpreting
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  dense["Dense visual region"] --> ask1["Aligns with known label?"]
  ask1 --> ask2["Stable under seed / params?"]
  ask2 --> ask3["Confirmed by metrics?"]
  ask3 --> claim["Hypothesis, not proof"]
items.caption: Treat visual clusters as prompts for further quantitative checks—not as ground-truth partitions.
